results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Integrated Supply Chain - Remote position | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Integrated Supply Chain - Remote position | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Integrated Supply Chain - Remote position
...
Baxter Healthcare Corporation offers an outstanding chance to create a real difference in global healthcare. As a Senior Data Scientist in our Coordinated Supply Chain group, you will lead the development of advanced analytics and AI solutions from idea to deployment. This role supports our mission to Save and Sustain Lives with data-driven innovation.
...
The Senior Data Scientist, Integrated Supply chain position is fully remote.
...
- Find opportunities for using company data to drive innovative and scalable machine learning solutions that address complex business challenges.
...
- Develop and implement strategies to improve operational efficiency, automate decision-making, improve customer outcomes, and optimize prioritisation through key insights that enable decision-making.
...
- Apply advanced analytics to evaluate organizational performance, simulate potential impacts of strategic changes, and support initiatives across domains such as predictive modeling, forecasting, classification, and recommendation systems.
...
- Develop custom machine learning models and algorithms tailored to business needs, applying these models to large datasets to generate actionable insights and support strategic decision-making.
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deploy, monitor, and maintain ML models in production environments, ensuring scalability, reliability, and compliance with enterprise standards.
...
- Build and maintain scalable data infrastructure to support both real-time and batch decisioning, bringing to bear cloud-native tools and platforms to optimize performance and cost.
...
- Ensure robust model governance, documentation, and performance benchmarking while maintaining compliance with Responsible AI and data privacy standards.
...
- Job Requirements
...
- Bachelor’s degree in math, statistics, engineering, or a related STEM field, or equivalent experience.
...
- APICs desirable, with a minimum of 5 years related experience in supply chain or equivalent analytical experience.
...
- Proven track record working in cross-functional product/engineering environments.
...
- Minimum 5 years experience in supply chain, or equivalent analytical experience
...
- Experience/Certifications in analytics tools and frameworks like Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Power Queries, Smartsheets, etc.
...
- Experience in at least two or more relevant domains (pricing, contracting, demand forecasting, supply-chain optimization, commercial analytics, patient/customer experience).
...
- Demonstrated ability to influence decision-making in a cross-functional environment using financial/technical assessments and soft skills.
...
- Define and evaluate Coordinated Business Planning scenarios.
...
- Decide inventory and service-level trade-offs to help drive central initiatives.
...
- Govern planning models and analytics.
...
- Translate analytics into business decisions, framing insights, recommending actions, and quantifying financial or operational impact for executives.
...
As part of our recruitment process, Baxter Corporation may use AI tools to assist screening candidates and assist in evaluating candidate qualifications. All final hiring decisions are made by the hiring manager and recruitment team.

results.title: Life Sciences Job at Baxter, USA | Apply Online
highlights:
Life Sciences Job at Baxter. Job Opportunity in the USA. Apply Online For remote Analyst, Real-World Data & Healthcare Analytics Job.
...
If you are an analytical data engineer or a healthcare informatics professional looking to leverage your advanced statistical skills within a world-class Medical Affairs division, this full-time position at Baxter is an exceptional opportunity. Strategically structured as a remote position anywhere in the United States, this role allows you to steer high-fidelity data manipulation from your home workspace. For quantitative researchers searching for a high-impact Life Sciences Job, this position offers hands-on ownership of the Premier Healthcare Database, hospital-level electronic health records (EHR), and interactive visualization pipelines. It serves as an elite launchpad for a long-term global Baxter career and stands out as a premier premium data architecture track for professionals hunting for a stable Remote Job in USA.
...
- Job Position: Analyst, Real-World Data & Healthcare Analytics
- Req ID: 203030
- Location: Deerfield, Illinois, United States (Remote)
...
As a Real-World Data Analyst, you will act as a primary technical contributor, transforming complex hospital transactional records and electronic health data into reproducible clinical and economic insights.
...
- Targeted Database Extractions: Utilizing advanced SQL to extract, clean, validate, and structure hospital-level chargemaster and EHR data, with a primary focus on the Premier Healthcare Database.
...
- Pipeline Automation: Developing and maintaining reproducible data analytics workflows and automated reporting pipelines to ensure all generated datasets remain audit-ready for this Life Sciences Job.
...
- HEOR Modeling Support: Preparing datasets to support Health Economics and Outcomes Research (HEOR) initiatives, including budget impact models, cost-effectiveness studies, and value-based care optimization metrics.
...
- Interactive Dashboard Design: Building and maintaining interactive, cross-functional dashboards in Power BI or Tableau to visualize product utilization trends, hospital waste, and adoption metrics across diverse surgical specialties.
...
- Scientific Dissemination: Supporting RWE generation for peer-reviewed scientific publications, medical education materials, and international congress presentations under a non-promotional framework.
...
This technical position is tailored for data specialists who possess strong analytical rigor, an impeccable eye for database integrity, and the ability to translate technical findings into clinically and economically meaningful insights.
...
- Educational Foundation: A formal Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Health Informatics, Statistics, Economics, Life Sciences, or a related quantitative scientific discipline.
...
- Industry Experience Tracking: 1–2+ years of direct experience manipulating healthcare data (EHR, claims, or hospital billing datasets).
...
- Technical Software Skills: Hands-on experience working directly with the Premier Healthcare Database is required, paired with high proficiency in SQL and basic data analysis exposure in R or Python.
...
- Prior analytics
...
In short, the Analyst position in Real-World Data & Healthcare Analytics at Baxter is a definitive route to transitioning your data science background into a high-visibility, clinical evaluation asset. Securing this role allows you to bypass generalized corporate reporting and take direct command of large-scale healthcare data ecosystems that determine how life-saving biological sealants are deployed in operating rooms across the globe. If you reside in the United States, possess a meticulous command of SQL, and are ready to excel within a remote clinical framework, apply today to secure this premier Life Sciences Job, advance a highly meaningful Baxter career, and lock in this outstanding Remote Job in USA.

results.title: Senior Manager, Market Intelligence, Customer Insights at Baxter International Inc. - United States Remote
highlights:
Senior Manager, Market Intelligence, Customer Insights at Baxter International Inc. - United States Remote
...
# Senior Manager, Market Intelligence, Customer Insights
...
## Baxter International Inc
...
Baxter International Inc. is an innovative, global healthcare leader that offers advanced products, technologies, and therapies to support people in leading healthier, longer lives. The company is committed to meeting the challenges faced by patients, clinicians, and customers in the evolving healthcare landscape, emphasizing resilience and a mission to save and sustain lives.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• turn complex healthcare data into clear strategic direction for the Advanced Surgery business. • lead market intelligence, forecasting, and competitive insights while shaping how the division understands its markets and future opportunities. • Lead global market intelligence and competitive insights across hemostats, sealants, adhesion prevention, and adjacent surgical categories. • Own annual global market sizing and forecasting, partnering with regional teams and aligning assumptions with Finance. • Deliver biannual market share and competitive landscape analyses to inform portfolio and long‑range planning. • Manage quarterly U.S. market size and growth reporting by integrating SG2, IQVIA, DRG, Premier, and internal performance data. • Conduct hands‑on Premier analytics to understand procedural trends, product utilization, and specialty‑level dynamics. • Translate complex data into clear, executive‑ready insights and strategic recommendations for senior leadership. • Support M&A, licensing, and partnership evaluations through market sizing, competitive assessments, and scenario modeling. • Build compelling narratives and present findings to cross‑functional stakeholders across Marketing, R&D, Medical, Regulatory, Finance, and Commercial.
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Experience analyzing healthcare or medical device datasets such as Premier, SG2, DRG, IQVIA, or similar claims and utilization sources. • Strong capability in Excel based modeling, forecasting, and market sizing. • Working experience with SAS, R, or SPSS; SQL or Python • Familiarity with medical coding, procedure based analytics, and claims or charge level data. • A demonstrated ability to translate complex analyses into clear, strategic insights for executive audiences. • Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to influence across functions and levels. • A proactive, intellectually curious mindset and comfort working independently on highly visible, recurring deliverables. • A collaborative, low ego approach and the ability to thrive in a fast paced, cross functional environment.
...
🤖 Artificial Intelligence
...
Capability Manager leading Agile practices and managing multiple projects for healthcare technology initiatives. Collaborating with teams to drive application development and operational excellence at ClinDCast.

results.title: Manager, Health Economics – Outcomes Research at Baxter International Inc. - United States Remote
highlights:
Manager, Health Economics – Outcomes Research at Baxter International Inc. - United States Remote
...
Baxter International Inc. is an innovative, global healthcare leader that offers advanced products, technologies, and therapies to support people in leading healthier, longer lives. The company is committed to meeting the challenges faced by patients, clinicians, and customers in the evolving healthcare landscape, emphasizing resilience and a mission to save and sustain lives.
...
# Manager, Health Economics – Outcomes Research
...
🌽 Illinois – Remote🌽 Illinois – Remote
...
## Baxter International Inc.
...
Baxter International Inc. is an innovative, global healthcare leader that offers advanced products, technologies, and therapies to support people in leading healthier, longer lives. The company is committed to meeting the challenges faced by patients, clinicians, and customers in the evolving healthcare landscape, emphasizing resilience and a mission to save and sustain lives.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Define the evidence strategy and lead the development of clinical and economic value evidence that supports scientific exchange and healthcare decision-making • Partner closely with Medical Affairs and Real-World Data Analytics to translate real-world data into compelling, scientifically rigorous value narratives • Ensure that hospital utilization insights are transformed into robust economic models and evidence supporting value-based care, hospital contracting, and healthcare system efficiency • Design and maintain economic models, including budget impact analyses (BIA) and cost-effectiveness analyses (CEA), across the surgical portfolio • Develop frameworks to translate hospital utilization data into total cost of care, efficiency, and product optimization insights • Provide the scientific foundation to support value-based agreements and hospital contracting through economic evidence generation • Define the evidence generation strategy and identify key clinical and economic evidence gaps in the U.S. surgical market • Lead the design of retrospective real-world evidence (RWE) studies and guide analytic execution in partnership with RWD analysts • Conduct literature reviews and meta-analyses to benchmark product performance against competitive technologies • Lead development of peer-reviewed manuscripts, abstracts, and conference submissions (e.g., ISPOR, AORN, surgical congresses) • Develop and maintain compliant scientific exchange tools (“Safe Harbor” materials) for Medical Science Liaisons and field teams • Lead Medical/Legal/Regulatory (MLR) review processes to ensure all materials meet compliance requirements • Partner with Medical Affairs leadership, RWD analysts, and cross-functional teams to align evidence generation with strategic priorities • Support non-promotional engagement with payers, hospital administrators, and health systems • Influence stakeholders across Medical and Commercial organizations while maintaining scientific independence
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Bachelors in Health Economics, Outcomes Research, Epidemiology, or related field • 5+ years of HEOR experience in MedTech, Pharma, or consulting, preferably with hospital-based products • Proven experience developing economic models (BIA, CEA) • Demonstrated experience in scientific publication development and evidence communication • Strong ability to interpret outputs from real-world data analyses (e.g., SQL, R, Python-supported workflows) • Up to 30% travel • Preferred Qualifications • Experience with surgical or hospital-based product portfolios • Familiarity with U.S. healthcare economics, hospital cost accounting, and payer reimbursement (CMS, private payers) • Experience supporting value-based care initiatives or hospital contracting strategies • Prior experience working in or alongside Medical Affairs organizations

## Job description
...
Are you ready to be part of a world-class team at Baxter Healthcare? We are seeking a dedicated R&D Engineer to join our innovative team in Skaneateles. This role offers the outstanding opportunity to contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine healthcare delivery. You will play a meaningful role in developing and implementing advanced technologies that save and sustain lives!
...
### What You'll Do:
...
* Design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts using programming languages such as Python, Java, or C#.
* Create and execute automated test cases to ensure the quality and reliability of software applications.
* Develop and maintain test automation frameworks using tools such as Selenium, Appium, or Playwright.
* Utilize version control systems, such as Git, to manage and track changes to test automation scripts.
* Implement test data management strategies to ensure accurate and efficient testing.
* Develop and maintain test data sets, including data creation, data validation, and data cleanup.
* Collaborate with development teams to ensure test data is properly integrated into the testing process.
...
### What You'll Bring:
...
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
* 1+ years of experience in software testing and automation.
* Experience with programming languages, such as Python, Java, or C#.
* Experience with test automation frameworks, such as Selenium or Appium.
* Strong understanding of software testing principles and methodologies.
* Experience with version control systems, such as Git.
* Knowledge of test data management and test environment management.
* Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

Baxter International employs 19,637 people (-0.3% YoY, -125 people) and has an annual revenue of $11.2B, founded in 1931. Headquartered in Deerfield, Illinois, United States, operates in 98 countries (including India, Mexico, Brazil, United Kingdom, and Belgium).
...
Facilitated the creation and growth of a data science team. Directed data innovation and collaboration by promoting cross-organizational idea sharing and implementing concepts into operations. Developed unique dashboard platform for large GPO and IDN customers, increasing product purchases over $40M in the first year. Created market research strategies to support value-based purchasing initiatives and successfully converted early-stage prototypes into client-ready tools.
...
will-see-you-now-activity
...
70498269689130311
...
Can chatbots replace doctors and nurses? While they can now pass the US medical licensing exam, there are more realistic opportunities for artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare. Here, our experts weigh in on the six most promising AI innovations, from earlier interventions to reducing admin tasks. Where do you see real potential for healthcare AI? bit.ly/40JVDfz #artificialintelligence #healthcare Traci Reed , Chad Malone, M.D. , Patrick Harrison , Meredith Hannah and Kristin Russell
...
We are at a pivotal moment in technology history. As organizations move to implement autonomous AI, it is evident that the effectiveness of this journey hinges on the quality of the data that supports it. AI agents require real-time context and integrated systems; data orchestration serves as the essential foundation for this future.
...
In the Med-Tech sector, the implications are significant. Creating a strong data layer goes beyond operational efficiency—it is crucial for security, compliance, and patient outcomes. I look forward to collaborating with our customers to ensure their data layers are organized, seamless, and secure for both legacy and agentic use cases.
...
Great afternoon with the MultiCare Health System team at the Baxter International Inc. CEC in Irvine
...
Amazing team. Great energy. Lots of laughs and excitement around the future of AI, Virtual care, integrations, and workflow automations. Incredible to see how fast healthcare is changing and how health systems are embracing the change. 

Also, some great discussions around AI decision making and who's ultimately responsible along with post-quantum computing (PQC) strategies.

## Job Details

We are building something unprecedented, an AI foundation that will fundamentally change how drug discovery research is conducted.
...
The Applied Intelligence for Discovery (AI4D) team is a newly formed group within Lilly Research Laboratories that operates at the intersection of scientific delivery and core platform development. AI4D’s mission is to connecting scientists to petabyte-scale data through natural language interfaces, automated analysis workflows, and intelligent search — and to convert early deployments into repeatable system standards and evaluation practices that scale across therapeutic areas.
...
As a Generative AI Engineer, you will design, build, and operate the core AI systems that power this transformation: retrieval-augmented generation over internal scientific documents, text-to-SQL over complex omics databases, agentic workflows that automate multi-step analyses, and the evaluation infrastructure that able the next-generation of medicines for patients.

Build evaluation frameworks measuring accuracy, reliability, and scientific validity of AI outputs

Experience building LLM-powered applications, including at least two of: RAG systems, text-to-SQL, agentic workflows, or fine-tuning pipelines
...
Strong software engineering skills in Python with experience building production-grade systems
...
Deep familiarity with the modern LLM ecosystem: embedding models, vector databases, and orchestration frameworks
...
Experience designing evaluation frameworks for LLM systems — systematic approaches to measuring accuracy, detecting hallucinations, and tracking regressions
...
Comfort working with complex, heterogeneous data — databases with hundreds of tables, specialized schemas, or domain-specific vocabularies
...

computing environments (

Familiarity with biomedical data types (omics, clinical, molecular) or scientific databases
...
Experience with MLOps/LLMOps tooling: experiment tracking, model registries, prompt versioning, A/B testing for AI systems

The successful candidate will work closely with data scientists and product leads to implement AI models, build required data and code pipelines through rigorous engineering disciplines You should have expertise in the design, development, management, and maintenance of systems and handling of large datasets. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.
...
- Coordinate between Data Scientists and Product Analysts
- Automate infrastructure used by the Data Science team
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced AI models and algorithms to solve complex business problems.
- Test and deploy models
- Develop minimum viable products based on machine learning
- Automate processes by utilizing machine learning
- Lead AI projects from conception to implementation, ensuring timely delivery and high-quality outcomes.
- Ability to create AI models utilizing deep learning, neural networks, and ML algorithms to derive business insights and fuel informed decision-making

...

- Ability to utilize various tools and methods to process data as well as create and keep up AI systems
...

...
- 5+ years of practical experience as an engineer with focus on implementation of AI / ML machine learning solutions.
- Masters in Computer Science / Machine Learning / AI, or related work experience with the design, building and evaluation of Machine Learning systems.
...
- 3+ years' experience with Machine Learning ecosystem tools, including pytorch/tensorflow, scikit-learn, xgboost or equivalents.
...

...

- Ability to work independently with limited supervision

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
AI Scientist II |
...
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.
